child_geo_events.address: 8822 E Upriver Dr, Spokane Valley, WA 99212, USA
child_geo_events.name: Community Resources - Pasadena Park Church of the Nazarene

data.information:
Resources are available to those affected at the Community Connect being held at Pasadena Church of the Nazarene (8822 E Upriver Rd, Spokane). Opportunities to learn about the fire, disaster recovery resources, county and community resources, and wildfire prevention will be available there.

These sessions will be held on Thursday, June 18, from 4 pm to 7 pm; Friday, June 19, from 9 am to 4 pm; and Saturday, June 20, from 9 am to 4 pm.

child_geo_events.address: 708 N Division St, Pinehurst, ID 83850, USA
child_geo_events.name: Real Life Ministries Silver Valley

data.information:
Real Life Church in Pinehurst located at 708 N Division St, Pinehurst, ID is open and available as a shelter for anyone in need of a safe place to stay, per Shoshone County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.

The church also has a field located behind the facility that can be used to shelter horses and other large animals if needed.

Residents needing a place to store trailers, RVs, horse trailers, or other large vehicles due to the evacuation order may utilize Metro Towing located at 709 Main St, Smelterville, ID, per Shoshone County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.

child_geo_events.address: 1126 N Hazard Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90063, USA
child_geo_events.name: City Terrace Park

data.information:
The Red Cross has opened a shelter at City Terrace Park to support anyone affected by the Boyle Heights industrial fire, per Red Cross Los Angeles on X.

Small pets are welcome, per LA County Emergency Website.

Uber is providing up to 2 free rides to residents traveling to or from the two temporary shelters, up to $40 per trip. To redeem the discount, riders must apply the promo code “ELASAFE26” in the Wallet section of their Uber app prior to requesting the ride to designated locations. Instructions on how to apply the promo code are here. Residents must be within 2.5 miles of the fire to qualify for the free ride. Promo code valid until 6/27.

child_geo_events.address: 995 Upper Red Rock Loop Rd, Sedona, AZ 86336, USA
child_geo_events.name: Red Rock Jr./Sr. High School

data.information:
The American Red Cross is opening an evacuation shelter in response to the Pocket Fire, located approximately 7 miles north of Sedona near the Coconino and Yavapai County line.

Red Rock Jr. High School
995 Upper Red Rock Loop Rd.
Sedona, AZ 86336

Our volunteers are on the way, and the shelter is expected to open at 10:00 p.m. for those impacted by evacuations.

If you need a safe place to stay, Red Cross is here to help.

Per American Red Cross Arizona on Facebook.

An evacuation center is open at 1650 Cooper Place in Pueblo.

The Human Society of the Pikes Peak Region is operating a shelter for small pets at 1650 Cooper Place.

data.information:
Community Animal Response Team (CART) has set up a shelter for large animals and livestock at the Colorado State Fairgrounds, enter at Gate 6 on Small Ave.

Anyone in need of transportation for their animals, call Beth at (719) 251-0245 - per the update from Pueblo County Sheriff's on Facebook.
